flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Mesalands Community College are 12% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($32.3k vs $36.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mesalands Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (23.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mesalands Community College rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 (321 → 411).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mesalands Community College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 (22.9% → 26.5%).
